dleplugin.name: DLE MCP Server
dleplugin.description: Full-site MCP HTTP/SSE server — control DLE via any AI client

operation.content:
<?php
if (!defined('DATALIFEENGINE') OR !defined('LOGGED_IN')) {
    header("HTTP/1.1 403 Forbidden");
    die("Hacking attempt!");
}
if (!$user_group[$member_id['user_group']]['admin_xfields'] && $member_id['user_group'] != '1') {
    msg("error", $lang['index_denied'], $lang['index_denied']);
}
require_once (ENGINE_DIR . '/modules/mcp/admin.php');
?>
